name: Democrats.org
subject: ✍️ Sign our birthday card for the First Lady:
body:
Happy Birthday, Michelle! **We're so thankful for everything Michelle Obama did as First Lady. Sign her birthday card to wish her a happy birthday:

** **[ADD YOUR NAME](http://my.democrats. "http://my.democrats.org/Happy-Birthday-Michelle-Obama1?keycode=&firstname=\(null\)&lastname=\(null\)&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=1+-+ADD+YOUR+NAME&utm_campaign=em_20170114_dnc_v1s1&source=em_20170114_dnc_v1s1")**

Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington DC 20003 and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If this isn't the best email address at which to reach you, [update your contact information](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c010/4067b0a/231ffbbce/7e785602/3884848252/VEsO/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/user/manage?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=8+-+update+your+contact+information&utm_campaign=em_20170114_dnc_v1s1&source=em_20170114_dnc_v1s1"). Our email list is the best way we have of staying in regular contact with supporters like you across the country and letting you know about the work President Obama and other Democrats are doing. If you like staying in touch, but want to receive only the most important messages, click [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c010/4067b0a/231ffbbce/7e785603/3884848252/VEsP/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/signup/less-email?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=9+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170114_dnc_v1s1&source=em_20170114_dnc_v1s1"). Click [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c010/4067b0a/231ffbbce/7e785600/3884848252/VEsHBQ/ "http://www.democrats.org/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=10+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170114_dnc_v1s1&source=em_20170114_dnc_v1s1") to unsubscribe from our supporter list, but if you leave, it will be harder for you to stay involved in the organization that you've been such a critical part of. This organization is powered by you, and we'd love to hear your ideas. Send us any comments, criticisms, or feedback [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c010/4067b0a/231ffbbce/7e785601/3884848252/VEsHBA/ "http://my.democrats.org/page/s/contact-the-democrats?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=11+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170114_dnc_v1s1&source=em_20170114_dnc_v1s1"), or just reply to this email! Thanks for supporting President Obama and other Democrats.

|

name: Team Kasich
subject: Watch Gov. Kasich on Monday
body:
Gov. John Kasich will travel to The King Center in Atlanta on
Monday to join Dr. Bernice King, daughter of Rev. Martin Luther
King, Jr., and others to discuss how Americans can come together
to strengthen our communities and bridge the racial divide.

Peter, Gov. John Kasich will
travel to The King Center in Atlanta on Monday to join Dr.
Bernice King, daughter of Rev. Martin Luther King, Jr., and
others to discuss how Americans can come together to strengthen
our communities and bridge the racial divide.

If you'd like to watch the event
live, please see the information below:

Date: Monday, January 16th

Time: 5:30PM ET

Watch Live Online: (Please note
that both links will provide their broadcasts at 5:30PM ET)

-Option 1:
BelovedCommunityTalks.org

-Option 2:
Facebook.com/TheKingCenter

If you're unable to watch this
event live, please visit Gov. Kasich's Facebook page soon after
for a video clip: Facebook.com/JohnKasich

Thank you!

-Team Kasich

Paid for by Kasich
for America
www.JohnKasich.com

This message was intended for: dpwillis67@gmail.com
You were added to the system July 18, 2015.
For more information please follow the URL below:
http://email.sermodigital.com/p/is4RZxAlNC

Follow the URL below to update your preferences or opt-out:
http://email.sermodigital.com/p/os4RZxAlNC

To unsubscribe from future mailings, send an email to mailto:unsub-41198944114-echo3-61DAEA83497D61BED2964EF6A3FD9254@emailsendr.net?Subject=Unsubscribe&body=Please%20remove%20me%20from%20further%20mailings
with "Unsubscribe" as the subject line.

name: Jessica O'Connell, EMILY's List
subject: You + 4,999,999 friends
body:
We elect pro-choice Democratic women who will fight for women and families. | [ ](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c716f/24c69fd9/fc79c2de/18eeab6f/17141894/VEsH/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/donate-to-emily?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=1+-+%0D%0A++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++&utm_campaign=WQENE111N_digital_email_20170113_Forward_n-all&source=WQENE111N_digital_email_20170113_Forward_n-all")
---

Peter,

We are now a community that's over five million strong!

That's you and 4,999,999 other people who are working together to elect more pro-choice Democratic women.

To keep supporting women who will hold Donald Trump accountable, fighting Republican attacks on choice, and winning tough elections we need to keep growing our mighty community.

**Can you forward the email below to three friends who might like to be part of EMILY's List?**

Thank you for all your support along the way,

Jess O'Connell
Executive Director, EMILY's List

\----

[](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c716f/24c69fd9/fc79c2de/18eeab68/17141894/VEsE/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/s/20170111_email_JoinEL?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=2&utm_campaign=WQENE111N_digital_email_20170113_Forward_n-all&source=WQENE111N_digital_email_20170113_Forward_n-all")

[](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c716f/24c69fd9/fc79c2de/18eeab69/17141894/VEsF/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/donate-to-emily?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=3&utm_campaign=WQENE111N_digital_email_20170113_Forward_n-all&source=WQENE111N_digital_email_20170113_Forward_n-all")

|
# EMILY's List is a community of over five million members that helps elect pro-choice Democratic women to office.
---

|
---
Paid for by EMILY's List [www.emilyslist.org](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c716f/24c69fd9/fc79c2de/18eeab6a/17141894/VEsC/ "http://www.emilyslist.org/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=4+-+wwwemilyslistorg&utm_campaign=WQENE111N_digital_email_20170113_Forward_n-all&source=WQENE111N_digital_email_20170113_Forward_n-all") and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
1800 M Street NW, Suite 375N, Washington, DC 20036 Thank you for being a supporter of EMILY's List. This email was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com. Inbox overcrowded? Sign up to get less email [here](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c716f/24c69fd9/fc79c2de/18eeab6b/17141894/VEsD/ "http://action.emilyslist.org/page/s/less-email-private-bc?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=5+-+here&utm_campaign=WQENE111N_digital_email_20170113_Forward_n-all&source=WQENE111N_digital_email_20170113_Forward_n-all"). We'd hate to see you go, but if you want to stop receiving all email, unsubscribe [here](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c716f/24c69fd9/fc79c2de/18eeab64/17141894/VEsA/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=6+-+here&utm_campaign=WQENE111N_digital_email_20170113_Forward_n-all&source=WQENE111N_digital_email_20170113_Forward_n-all"). Have a question? Feel free to drop us a line at [information@emilyslist.org](mailto:information@emilyslist.org) or simply reply to this email.

Contributions or gifts to EMILY's List or endorsed candidates are not tax deductible.

name: Maryland Progressives (via VanHollen.org)
subject: [RSVP NOW]: Save Health Care Rally
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Van Hollen for US Senate
body:
More than 90% of all Americans now have health care and we don't want to see our country move backwards. | Friend, we wanted to send you a quick reminder that this Sunday, January 15th, is a NATIONAL Day of Action to save health care. We hope you will join the hundreds of people who have already signed-up to join us to demonstrate that we will fight tooth and nail to stop Donald Trump and Congressional Republicans from turning back the clock on progress we have made.

More than 90% of all Americans now have health care and we don't want to see our country move backwards. Please join us at 2pm on Sunday in Bowie, Maryland to show your commitment to protecting the progress that has been made on health care!

**[Join us on Sunday. Send in your RSVP here>>>](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91b58/70cdc2ba/4747f338/39797f4/2444602377/VEsH/ "http://action.vanhollen.org/page/s/event-join-us-protect-the-aca?utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=1+-+Join+us+on+Sunday+Send+in+your+RSVP+here&utm_campaign=em011417&source=em011417")** **WHEN:** Sunday, January 15th 2:00 PM
**WHERE:** Bowie Student Center Ballroom. Bowie State University
14000 Jericho Park Road, Bowie MD 20715
PARKING: Lot J-1 [**[MAP LINK]**](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91b58/70cdc2ba/4747f338/39797f5/2444602377/VEsE/ "https://s.bsd.net/cvanhollen/main/page/-/MAP_CVH_Jan17.jpg?utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=2+-+MAP+LINK&utm_campaign=em011417&source=em011417") [Yes, I'll be there](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91b58/70cdc2ba/4747f338/39797f2/2444602377/VEsF/ "http://action.vanhollen.org/page/s/event-join-us-protect-the-aca?utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=3+-+Yes+Ill+be+there&utm_campaign=em011417&source=em011417") Republicans wants to repeal the Affordable Health Care Act and strip 30 million people of their health care without any plan to replace it. **[Please join us on Sunday and help show them Marylanders are committed to stopping this reckless scheme.](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91b58/70cdc2ba/4747f338/39797f3/2444602377/VEsC/ "http://action.vanhollen.org/page/s/event-join-us-protect-the-aca?utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=4+-+Please+join+us+on+Sunday+and+help+show+t&utm_campaign=em011417&source=em011417")**

We hope to see you there.

Team Van Hollen

---

Paid for by Van Hollen for US Senate
---

[www.vanhollen.org/donate](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91b58/70cdc2ba/4747f338/39797f0/2444602377/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/vanhollen?utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=5+-+wwwvanhollenorgdonate&utm_campaign=em011417&source=em011417")

We believe that emails are a vital way to stay in direct contact with supporters. You're receiving this email at dpwillis67@gmail.com. [**Click here**](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91b58/70cdc2ba/4747f338/39797f1/2444602377/VEsA/ "http://action.vanhollen.org/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=6+-+Click+here&utm_campaign=em011417&source=em011417") if you'd like to unsubscribe from these messages. Please enter dpwillis67@gmail.com to ensure that we are able to unsubscribe you from our list.

name: VanHollen.org
subject: [POLL] HEALTHCARE
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Van Hollen for US Senate
body:
Friend,

After a year of great highs and lows, 2017 has arrived! This New Year will be one of challenges and tests.

Everyday I meet people who want to know what they can do in the weeks and months ahead to protect the progress we have made and push back against Trump policies that threaten to drag us backwards.

This moment in history calls for vigilance, engagement, and mobilization. Reach out to your neighbors and engage with people who may have a different political outlook. Join local, state and national organizations dedicated to the common good. And be prepared to mobilize and march to protect the promise of America -- equal rights, equal justice and equal opportunity.

There is important work we can do through an array of community, state and national organizations that have been and will continue to work to expand educational and economic opportunity, end homelessness, defend women's rights, support immigrants, protect our environment, advance social justice, fight racism and reduce violence. Getting more involved in civil society groups is one way to push back against those who want to turn back the clock in America.

In the Senate, I will be working hard with my new colleagues to defeat the destructive legislative initiatives that are already being drafted. As the new Chair of the Democratic Senatorial Campaign Committee (DSCC), I will also be working to re-elect the 25 Senators in our Democratic Caucus who are up for election in 2018 -- these seats represent the last Blue line of defense against the Trump agenda.

As they say -- trying times test what we are made of. I am confident that we are up to the task ahead.

On Tuesday I will have the honor of taking the oath of office to serve you and the people of Maryland in the United States Senate. I am ready to get to work to defend our values, meet our challenges, and seize any opportunity to move our nation toward an ever more perfect union.

Thank you for your trust and support. Let's get to work together!

Chris

Paid for by Van Hollen for US Senate
You're receiving this email at: dpwillis67@gmail.com
If you'd like to unsubscribe visit: http://action.vanhollen.org/unsubscribe

name: John Lewis
subject: what Donald Trump said
body:
I'm asking you to help Democrats stand up to injustice Friend --

Today, Donald Trump attacked me on Twitter. He said that I'm "all talk" and "no action."

I've been beaten bloody, tear-gassed, fighting for what's right for America. I've marched at Selma with Dr. King. Sometimes that's what it takes to move our country in the right direction.

We refuse to stop now. We're not done fighting for progress. We're ready for the next four years.

Are you with us? Join me and chip in whatever you can today to help Democrats stand up to injustice.

**If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately and be divided evenly between the DNC and John Lewis for Congress.

**[QUICK DONATE: $3](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c03a/4067b0a/231198b0c/7e784869/2626631610/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dnc-john-lewis?express_lane=true&amount=3&refcode=express_lane_3&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=1+-+QUICK+DONATE+3&utm_campaign=em_20170114_jl_nd&source=em_20170114_jl_nd")**

**[QUICK DONATE: $10](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c03a/4067b0a/231198b0c/7e784876/2626631610/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dnc-john-lewis?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=express_lane_10&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=2+-+QUICK+DONATE+10&utm_campaign=em_20170114_jl_nd&source=em_20170114_jl_nd")**

**[QUICK DONATE: $25](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c03a/4067b0a/231198b0c/7e784877/2626631610/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dnc-john-lewis?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=express_lane_25&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=3+-+QUICK+DONATE+25&utm_campaign=em_20170114_jl_nd&source=em_20170114_jl_nd")**

**[QUICK DONATE: $50](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c03a/4067b0a/231198b0c/7e784874/2626631610/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dnc-john-lewis?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=express_lane_50&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=4+-+QUICK+DONATE+50&utm_campaign=em_20170114_jl_nd&source=em_20170114_jl_nd")**

**[QUICK DONATE: $100](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c03a/4067b0a/231198b0c/7e784875/2626631610/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dnc-john-lewis?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=express_lane_100&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=5+-+QUICK+DONATE+100&utm_campaign=em_20170114_jl_nd&source=em_20170114_jl_nd")**

**[Or donate another amount.](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c03a/4067b0a/231198b0c/7e784872/2626631610/VEsA/ "http://my.democrats.org/Stand-Up-to-Injustice?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=6+-+Or+donate+another+amount&utm_campaign=em_20170114_jl_nd&source=em_20170114_jl_nd")**

** While we have made progress toward a vision of a more fair, just and open country, the majority of Americans are afraid this country is headed in the wrong direction.

Some leaders reject decades of progress and want to return to the dark past, when the power of law was used to deny the freedoms protected by the Constitution, the Bill of Rights, and its Amendments.

I remember when segregation was the law of the land that ordered our society in the Deep South. The forces of law and order in Alabama were so strong that to take a stand against this injustice, we had to be willing to sacrifice our lives for our cause.

It took massive, well-organized, non-violent dissent and criticism of this great nation and its laws to move toward a greater sense of equality in America. We had to sit in. We had to stand in. We had to march. And that's why more than 50 years ago, a group of unarmed citizens, black and white, gathered on March 7, 1965, in an orderly peaceful non-violent fashion to walk from Selma to Montgomery, Alabama.

Often, the only way we could demonstrate that a law on the books violated a higher law was by challenging that law. By putting our bodies on the line and showing the world the unholy price we had to pay for dignity and respect.

We need leaders who will stand up and speak up and speak out for Americans, not someone who will work against us. Not someone who will move us backwards.

That's why I will do everything in my power to take on injustice. Will you join me?

Chip in now and help us keep working for what is right:

**[https://my.democrats.org/Stand-Up-to-Injustice](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c03a/4067b0a/231198b0c/7e784873/2626631610/VEsB/ "http://my.democrats.org/Stand-Up-to-Injustice?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=7+-+httpsmydemocratsorgStandUptoInjustice&utm_campaign=em_20170114_jl_nd&source=em_20170114_jl_nd")**

Thank you for all that you do for this great country,

John Lewis

|
---|---

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If this isn't the best email address at which to reach you, [update your contact information](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c03a/4067b0a/231198b0c/7e784870/2626631610/VEsO/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/user/manage?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=8+-+update+your+contact+information&utm_campaign=em_20170114_jl_nd&source=em_20170114_jl_nd"). Our email list is the best way we have of staying in regular contact with supporters like you across the country and letting you know about the work President Obama and other Democrats are doing. If you like staying in touch, but want to receive only the most important messages, click [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c03a/4067b0a/231198b0c/7e784871/2626631610/VEsP/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/signup/less-email?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=9+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170114_jl_nd&source=em_20170114_jl_nd"). Click [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c03a/4067b0a/231198b0c/7e78487e/2626631610/VEsHBQ/ "http://www.democrats.org/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=10+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170114_jl_nd&source=em_20170114_jl_nd") to unsubscribe from our supporter list, but if you leave, it will be harder for you to stay involved in the organization that you've been such a critical part of. This organization is powered by you, and we'd love to hear your ideas. Send us any comments, criticisms, or feedback [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c03a/4067b0a/231198b0c/7e78487f/2626631610/VEsHBA/ "http://my.democrats.org/page/s/contact-the-democrats?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=11+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170114_jl_nd&source=em_20170114_jl_nd"), or just reply to this email! Thanks for supporting President Obama and other Democrats.

|
clean_body: I'm asking you to help Democrats stand up to injustice Friend -- Today, Donald Trump attacked me on Twitter. He said that I'm "all talk" and "no action." I've been beaten bloody, tear-gassed, fighting for what's right for America. I've marched at Selma with Dr. King. Sometimes that's what it takes to move our country in the right direction. We refuse to stop now. We're not done fighting for progress. We're ready for the next four years. Are you with us? Join me and chip in whatever you can today to help Democrats stand up to injustice. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately and be divided evenly between the DNC and John Lewis for Congress. We had to march. And that's why more than 50 years ago, a group of unarmed citizens, black and white, gathered on March 7, 1965, in an orderly peaceful non-violent fashion to walk from Selma to Montgomery, Alabama. Often, the only way we could demonstrate that a law on the books violated a higher law was by challenging that law. By putting our bodies on the line and showing the world the unholy price we had to pay for dignity and respect.
